name: clautorun
description: Automation suite: clautorun (file policies, autonomous sessions, plan export) + pdf-extractor (PDF data extraction)

plugins.name: clautorun
plugins.description: Autonomous task automation with file creation policies and session persistence

plugins.name: pdf-extractor
plugins.description: PDF data extraction with 9 backend support (markitdown, docling, marker, pdfplumber, pdfminer, pypdf2, pymupdf4llm, pdfbox, pdftotext)
